prompt: Document the EventBus system. It has EventBus.cs as the main manager, EventChannel.cs as a ScriptableObject channel, and EventListener.cs as a MonoBehaviour subscriber. The EventBus routes events through SO channels with type-safe generics. Document it for the team.
assertions: Output is saved to a Documents/Systems/ path with .md extension
Document contains all 8 required sections: Overview, Architecture, Public API, Decision Drivers, Data Flow, Extension Guide, Dependencies, Known Limitations
Document contains at least 2 Mermaid diagram blocks
Document contains file:line citations in format (filename.cs:N)
Document has Owner and Next Review Due metadata fields filled in
Document does not contain TODO, TBD, or FIXME placeholders
The skill loaded the system-doc-template.md reference
